news.headline: Revolut makes second attempt at US bank charter, appoints new US CEO
Crypto-friendly fintech giant Revolut files for U.S. banking license
US Bitcoin reserve still has no plan to stack sats
NYSE-owner forges strategic partnership with OKX exchange for tokenized stocks, crypto futures
NYSE owner ICE invests in OKX at $25B as tokenized stocks plan takes shape
Bitcoin takes aim at $74,000. Surprisingly, the dollar's rallying too.
Bitcoin bears 'annihilated' as analysis sees $65K support test next
Bitcoin holds above $72,000 as crypto market pauses after breakout
